summary: Tested female size standardization across Bulk Orders, POD Design, Boutique, and Custom Order pages. All pages correctly show female sizes as 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, Other. Custom size input appears when 'Other' is selected with quantity > 0. Admin modals have overflow-y: auto for scrolling when content exceeds viewport.

issues: /admin/login route redirects to footer-only page; correct route is /admin

pod_design_page.other_size_custom_input: PASS - Custom size input appears when 'Other' is selected

boutique_page.custom_size_input_in_modal: PASS - Custom size input appears when 'Other' is selected

custom_order_page.female_sizes_dropdown_option: PASS - 'Female Sizes' option in Size Type dropdown

custom_order_page.other_size_custom_input: PASS - 'Custom Size Specification' input appears when Other qty > 0

admin_modal_scrollability.overflow_setting: PASS - Modals have overflow-y: auto for scroll when content exceeds viewport
admin_modal_scrollability.add_item_modal: VERIFIED - Modal opens and has scrollable settings

critical_code_review_comments: FEMALE_SIZES array correctly defined as ['6', '8', '10', '12', '14', 'Other'] in all relevant pages
Custom size input properly conditionally rendered when 'Other' is selected
data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All female size standardization features working correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Female sizes standardized to 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, Other across all relevant pages (Bulk Orders, POD Design, Boutique modal, Custom Order). Each page correctly shows 'Other' custom size input when selected. Admin modals have overflow-y: auto for scrolling. Souvenirs page excluded from size changes as per requirement. Admin login route is /admin (not /admin/login).
